title: Xtra Tangy Turkish Egg Yolks Kebabs
description: A tangy and festive Turkish dish featuring egg yolks, grilled to perfection in a wok, low in carbs and high in flavor
instructions: Preheat a wok over medium-high heat, adding a small amount of olive oil to the pan
In a bowl, whisk together egg yolks, turkish pepper paste, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper until well combined
Add the minced garlic to the bowl and mix well
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the egg yolk mixture onto the preheated wok, forming small kebabs
Cook the kebabs for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until they are cooked through and slightly charred
Garnish the kebabs with chopped parsley and serve immediately
Serve the kebabs with a side of low-carb vegetables or a salad for a well-rounded meal
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days
